pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugin versions may not support compiling for Java 21 release.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may fail to compile or process annotations on Java 21 due to internal API changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade checkstyle-plugin to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older checkstyle plugin versions may fail to run or parse code on Java 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade jacoco-plugin to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JaCoCo versions do not support instrumenting or analyzing Java 21 class files.
